title: Phase 16.12B — API Data Fix + Full Inspection + Evidence-Based Diagnosis — FINAL REPORT

part_a_api_fix.gsc_auth: HEALTHY — token refresh working, Search Analytics accessible
part_a_api_fix.policy: API is the only accepted source for current data. Cache/manual values are comparison only.

part_b_inspection.blocker: GSC URL Inspection API returns 403 for blog/tool/guide/decision/compare URLs. Only calculators and static pages are inspectable with current permissions.

what_changed_from_original_phase16_12.gsc_data: Now based on API-only (304 imp) with documented undercount vs UI. Not using cached files or manual values as pipeline truth.
what_changed_from_original_phase16_12.claims: All claims now labeled EXACT/ESTIMATED/SAMPLE_BASED. '20% indexed' → '19.8% in 101-URL sample, 238 indexed per GSC UI'.
what_changed_from_original_phase16_12.diagnosis: Authority ceiling is now labeled INFERRED_WITH_STRONG_EVIDENCE, not stated as fact. All contributing factors documented separately.
what_changed_from_original_phase16_12.coverage: Exact counts from 101 valid inspections. Full extrapolation removed. 149-URL blockage documented with exact error.
